title: Smoothie stone
description: Turn stone into a lighter and smoother texture
body:
**It turns stone into a smoother and lighter version of it self, as seen in Gallery**
The pack can be used in crystal pvp, or just in normal gameplay. The pack was also made for 1.21 but should work for future versions.
The also doesnt look good unless you use some sort of pack or mod the un-randomizes the stone random rotation.
